allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Exclude node_modules,.git,.next | Where-Object { !$_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.Replace\("D:\\creation\\dotnovel\\", ""\) })
PowerShell($job = Start-Job { Set-Location "D:\\creation\\dotnovel"; npm run dev 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; Receive-Job $job; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job)
PowerShell($job = Start-Job { Set-Location "D:\\creation\\dotnovel"; npm run dev 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; Receive-Job $job; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job)
PowerShell($job = Start-Job { Set-Location "D:\\creation\\dotnovel"; npm run dev 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; Receive-Job $job; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job)
PowerShell(npm view @clerk/nextjs versions --json 2>&1 | ConvertFrom-Json | Where-Object { $_ -match "^[56]\\." } | Select-Object -Last 10)
PowerShell($job = Start-Job { Set-Location "D:\\creation\\dotnovel"; npm run dev 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 14; Receive-Job $job; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job)
PowerShell(node -e "try { const r = require\('./node_modules/next-intl/routing'\); console.log\(typeof r.defineRouting\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\(e.message\) }")
PowerShell($job = Start-Job { Set-Location "D:\\creation\\dotnovel"; npm run dev 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 25; Receive-Job $job; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job)
